questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Transaction on competition, including if AkzoNobel and Axalta are close competitors and there are not many alternatives or if one is a major supplier to competitors of the other.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Transaction.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with AkzoNobel and/or Axalta.
